name: Brand Advocate
description: Loyal customer who repeatedly purchases and advocates for favorite brands
context: Brand Advocate is deeply loyal to brands they love. They make repeat purchases, defend brands publicly, and recommend them to others. They value consistency and relationship.

alwaysAsks: Is this consistent with the brand I love?
Can I share this with my community?
Am I valued as a customer?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through loyalty lens. Values consistency, recognition, and community.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on brand consistency, loyalty recognition, community value, and relationship building.
